Malibu, CA • CASE STUDY
PRIVATE RESIDENCE METRICS

The Zenith Residence

“A stunning ultra-modern villa hovering above the tides of the Pacific Ocean.”

PROJECT METRICS & RATINGS
DIMENSIONS

14,000 SQFT

COMPLETION

Q1 2024

FACADE COMPOSITION

Travertine Slabs

LOCATION

Malibu, CA

THE STRUCTURAL DIALOGUE

Harmonizing weight with gravity.

The Zenith Residence represents the absolute pinnacle of coastal architectural engineering. Anchored deep into solid beach granite, the structure suspends four cantilevered travertine decks directly over the breaking surf. All glazing frames utilize special structural aeronautical alloys, protecting the interior from salt-spray while creating a zero-tolerance boundary with nature. Inside, structural columns are replaced by a post-tensioned overhead truss system, leaving completely unobstructed 360-degree views of Malibu's pristine coastlines.

“A precise alignment of structural load lines protects interior spatial integrity, forming an ambient buffer zone with local environmental elements.”

Material Palette Analysis:

01
Travertine SlabsCurated, zero-decay finish matching structural weight properties. Highly reflective thermal glass integrations.
02
Structural ConcreteCurated, zero-decay finish matching structural weight properties. Highly reflective thermal glass integrations.
03
Water-Clear Facade GlassCurated, zero-decay finish matching structural weight properties. Highly reflective thermal glass integrations.
